label: Text_Manual_Sickle
text_preview: "Sickle" Cut the grass to make feed, It's the feed for cows and chickens. I would be thrown into a pinch if it's gone.

label: Text_Manual_Hoe
text_preview: "Hoe" Plow the ground to make a field. Raise vegetables in the field. Try various ways to make thefield.

label: Text_Manual_Axe
text_preview: "Axe" Split logs to make lumber. Lumber is useful. Focus on one point and hit. Don't enter the control pad.

label: Text_Manual_Hammer
text_preview: "Hammer" Breaks rocks and breaks fences down. Big rocks can be knocked down when focusing on one spot. Don't ever enter the control pad.

label: Text_Manual_Can
text_preview: "Watering can" Water the crops. Once a day.No watering is necessary on rainy days. Dip up water at a well or a pond when it runs out.

label: Text_Manual_Milker
text_preview: "Milker" Milk cows and ship the milk.

label: Text_Manual_Brush
text_preview: "Brush" Brushing raises the cows' level of affection. A cow with High affection gives a lot of milk.

label: Text_Manual_Bell
text_preview: "Bell" A tool used to herd cows. Look at the cows carefully and move them properly.

label: Text_Manual_CropSeeds
text_preview: "Vegetable seeds" Sowing season is different. Ask the florist for the proper season. Seeds must be sown in the field. They won't bud without watering.

label: Text_Manual_GrassSeeds
text_preview: "Grass seeds" Sow the field from spring tosummer. It grows without watering. The Meadow must be ready forraising cows and chickens. Grass is ready for mowing when it turns a deep green.

label: Text_Manual_Paint
text_preview: "Paint" Paint the house right.

label: Text_456_Manual_TomatoCornSeedsMustPlanted
text_preview: Tomato and corn seeds must be planted in summer. Notice: Never grow when planting in other seasons. Be able to have more fruits by watering after the harvest. Tomatoes grow quicker. Die in autumn. Shipping rate: Tomato!<

label: Text_457_Manual_TurnipPotatoSeedsMustbePlanted
text_preview: Turnip and potato seeds mustbe planted in spring. They grow quicker than tomatoes and corn. turnip are a quick grower. Only one harvest per year. Shipping rate: Turnip!<CTRL_B3> piece <$00B8><CTRL_B2>G Potato!<CTRL_B3> p

label: Text_458_Manual_GrassSeedsMustPlantedSpring

label: Text_45A_Weather_CowsSaleYoungOnesMilk
text_preview: Cows on sale are young ones that can't milk. Takes <CTRL_B4><CTRL_B3> days to grow large enough for milking. The key is to keep them awayfrom sickness: Don't forget to feed. Don't let them out when it rains:lightening:hu

label: Text_45B_Manual_EquipMilkerPointYButton
text_preview: Equip the milker and point Y button to a cow to milk. Only once a day. Cow's affection rate increases when being brushedor talked to. Cows you devote your affection to can produce middle-sized and large-sized milk.

label: Text_45C_Weather_CowsEatGrownGrassGrass
text_preview: Cows eat well grown grass. When the grass is young: it's like not feeding: so be careful. Cut grass makes fodder. It's feed in rainy days and winter. Don't run out of it.

label: Text_45D_Weather_ChickensLayOneEggDay
text_preview: Chickens lay one egg a day. It doesn't lay eggs for <CTRL_B5> days when you forget to feed or it gets wet in the rain. They could be blown away when you let them outside during hurricane. Possibly to be eaten by wild dog

label: Text_45E_Animal_EggsBecomeChicksDayswhenIncubate
text_preview: Eggs become chicks in <CTRL_B5> dayswhen you incubate them. No feed is necessary for chicks. Chicks grow to chickens in <$00B9> days. If you increase the amount of chickens: the feed will run out so be careful
